tools.name: luogu_search_problems
tools.description: Search Luogu problems by keyword. Use this before fetching a problem when you only know a topic or partial title.

tools.name: luogu_fetch_problem
tools.description: Fetch a Luogu problem statement, formats, samples, tags, difficulty, and source URL by pid.

tools.name: luogu_resolve_problem
tools.description: Resolve a Luogu problem from a URL, problem id, or title fragment, then fetch the problem details.

tools.name: luogu_find_related_problems
tools.description: Find related Luogu practice problems by mixing topic/pain-point recommendations with live keyword search.

tools.name: luogu_list_algorithm_topics
tools.description: List canonical algorithm topics, aliases, and known Luogu tag ids used by the high-level topic search route.

tools.name: luogu_find_topic_problems
tools.description: Find Luogu practice problems for an algorithm topic using aliases, known Luogu tag ids, deduplication, and match reasons.

tools.name: luogu_search_problem_sets
tools.description: Search Luogu training/problem sets by keyword. By default, combines title-filtered official sets with selected user-shared sets.

tools.name: luogu_fetch_problem_set
tools.description: Fetch a Luogu training/problem set and its problem summaries by id.

tools.name: luogu_recommend_problems
tools.description: Recommend seed Luogu problems from a topic or student pain point, with search hints for further exploration.

tools.name: luogu_get_user_profile
tools.description: Fetch public Luogu user profile data by uid.

tools.name: luogu_get_capabilities
tools.description: Report which LeetCode-style route capabilities are available, auth-required, or planned for Luogu.
